goal: Map reviewed KakaoBank facts into tau3-style mutable state, tool actions, and verifier assertions.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: EvaluationCriteria stores expected actions, env_assertions, communicate_info, nl_assertions, and reward_basis.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: Every synthetic task must compile into expected tool actions and/or env assertions, not only natural-language answers.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: InitializationData and InitialState seed agent/user DB state and optional setup actions.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: Customer, account, loan, consent, document, remittance, and card fixtures live in initial_state-style tables.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: The evaluator replays the full trajectory into a predicted environment, replays gold actions into a gold environment, then compares DB hashes.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: Write tools must be deterministic and update canonical tables; verifier state cannot depend on free-form transcript text.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: ActionEvaluator checks whether expected tool calls appear with matching arguments.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: High-risk banking procedures should require exact tool actions in addition to final DB state where useful.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: Tools are typed as read/write/think/generic and mutates_state controls replay.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: Read/query tools never mutate state; write tools are the only actions that affect DB hash.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: KnowledgeBase documents are separate from TransactionalDB mutable state.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: The 207 KakaoBank tau3 documents remain retrieval KB; this schema defines the separate transactional/verifier DB.

tau3_crosscheck.finding: All 97 original banking_knowledge tasks declare required_documents and many use user-side tools.
tau3_crosscheck.kakaobank_decision: KakaoBank tasks should keep required_documents and can use user tools for customer-side applications or confirmations.

state_model_principles: Use one canonical mutable table for each business object; keep product rules in the KB/fact DB.
Represent user-side behavior explicitly when original tau3 would model it as requestor=user actions.
Keep money, dates, limits, and status flags as structured values so DB hash comparison is meaningful.
Do not store derived policy decisions unless a tool action creates a durable decision record.
Prefer env_assertions for predicate checks that should not require full DB equality.

state_tables.name: customers
state_tables.purpose: Customer identity, age, residency, customer class, and risk flags.

state_tables.name: businesses
state_tables.purpose: Business-registration state for personal business products.

state_tables.name: consents
state_tables.purpose: Terms, guardian, privacy, and delegated-representative consent records.

state_tables.name: accounts
state_tables.purpose: Demand-deposit, business-account, base-account, and linked-account status.

state_tables.name: deposit_contracts
state_tables.purpose: Installment savings, fixed deposit, child savings, and one-month savings contracts.

state_tables.name: savings_boxes
state_tables.purpose: SafeBox, Piggy Bank, VAT Box, Dollar Box, and record-book section-like balances.
verifier_use: box close or partial withdrawal restrictions

state_tables.name: auto_transfer_rules
state_tables.purpose: Scheduled deposit, recurring savings, auto collect, and auto transfer setup.

state_tables.name: group_memberships
state_tables.purpose: Meeting-account owner/member state and information-sharing consent.

state_tables.name: pockets
state_tables.purpose: Meeting-account pockets and record-book sections.

state_tables.name: child_relationships
state_tables.purpose: Child account/savings representative authority.

state_tables.name: cards
state_tables.purpose: mini card and debit/card-like payment instrument state.

state_tables.name: card_orders
state_tables.purpose: New issue and reissue requests.

state_tables.name: prepaid_wallets
state_tables.purpose: KakaoBank mini prepaid balance and youth limits.
verifier_use: mini is not a deposit account

state_tables.name: loans
state_tables.purpose: Credit, business, lease, mortgage, and used-car loan contracts.

state_tables.name: loan_applications
state_tables.purpose: Pre-contract applications, comparison results, screening decisions, and customer-selected terms.

state_tables.name: refinance_requests
state_tables.purpose: Loan switching/refinance lifecycle for credit, business, and mortgage loans.
verifier_use: old-loan repayment failure cancels new loan
normal old-loan repayment cannot be undone

state_tables.name: required_documents
state_tables.purpose: Documents required before/after execution for loans, deposit restrictions, or identity verification.

state_tables.name: mortgage_collateral
state_tables.purpose: Mortgage home, lien, move-in, and ownership-obligation state.

state_tables.name: lease_contracts
state_tables.purpose: Lease deposit loan contract and landlord-payment state.

state_tables.name: vehicle_purchase_cases
state_tables.purpose: Used-car purchase loan vehicle and title-transfer state.

state_tables.name: comparison_sessions
state_tables.purpose: Loan comparison service quotes and selected partner-product handoff.
verifier_use: KakaoBank has no contract authority for partner products

state_tables.name: remittance_profiles
state_tables.purpose: Outbound/inbound remittance eligibility, annual limits, and auto-receive settings.

state_tables.name: remittance_cases
state_tables.purpose: Outbound, inbound, return, correction, cancellation, and gift remittance cases.

state_tables.name: service_enrollments
state_tables.purpose: Credit-info, business-credit-info, document box, child service, meeting account, VAT box, and linked services.

state_tables.name: transfer_references
state_tables.purpose: Balance-less external payees and synthetic transfer sources or targets used by transfer tools.
verifier_use: transfer source and target precondition checks without treating references as ledger rows

state_tables.name: transactions
state_tables.purpose: Posted or pending account, card, mini, savings-box, remittance, fee, and auto-collect transaction events.

state_tables.name: disputes
state_tables.purpose: Card, transaction, service, and customer-objection dispute records.

action_families.name: KB_search
action_families.notes: Same conceptual role as original banking_knowledge retrieval; it should not affect DB hash.

action_families.name: grep
action_families.notes: Same conceptual role as original banking_knowledge grep retrieval; it should not affect DB hash.

action_families.name: get_customer_profile
action_families.notes: Read identity, age, business registration, and consent flags.

action_families.name: get_account_or_contract
action_families.notes: Read current mutable state before advising or executing.

action_families.name: log_identity_verification
postconditions: A durable verification event exists for the customer and task.
action_families.notes: Mirrors original banking_knowledge log_verification-style state.

action_families.name: open_or_enroll_product
postconditions: A new account, contract, service, wallet, or card record is created only when eligibility and preconditions pass.
action_families.notes: Used when the bank-side action creates or enrolls a product.

action_families.name: customer_apply_for_product
postconditions: A user-side application or request record exists with selected product and payload.
action_families.notes: Direct analogue of original banking_knowledge user tools such as apply_for_credit_card.

action_families.name: close_account_or_service
postconditions: Target status changes to closed only when linked-product, legal restriction, member, balance, or age rules allow it.
action_families.notes: Captures closure tasks for demand accounts, deposits, child/meeting services, mini, and boxes.

action_families.name: configure_auto_transfer
postconditions: Auto-transfer rule is created, changed, cancelled, or rejected with deadline-aware status.
action_families.notes: Needed for 26-week savings, child savings, free savings, and common auto-transfer rules.

action_families.name: execute_deposit_or_box_transfer
postconditions: Balances and transaction records reflect allowed deposit, withdrawal, section close, or box transfer.
action_families.notes: Handles one-month deposits, emergency withdrawals, SafeBox/Piggy/VAT/RecordBook movement.

action_families.name: request_interest_payment
postconditions: Accrued interest is paid to principal or the configured destination only when product-specific interest-payment rules allow it.
action_families.notes: Captures products such as SafeBox where a customer-requested interest payment date is distinct from monthly scheduled payment.

action_families.name: request_maturity_or_extension
postconditions: Maturity close, auto-close, deposit extension, or loan extension is applied or rejected with a reason.
action_families.notes: Separates deposit renewal/auto-close from loan maturity extension.

action_families.name: submit_required_document
postconditions: Required document status is updated to submitted, accepted, rejected, late, or locked.
action_families.notes: Useful for lease/mortgage/car-loan pre- and post-execution deadlines.

action_families.name: create_loan_application
postconditions: Loan application or comparison handoff record exists; quote remains non-final until contracted.
action_families.notes: Covers direct loan and comparison-service paths.

action_families.name: update_loan_contract_state
postconditions: Loan status, acceleration, immediate-repayment, restriction, collateral, or deadline state is updated deterministically.
action_families.notes: High-risk loan tasks should usually include an env assertion for the exact violated or satisfied condition.

action_families.name: process_refinance_request
postconditions: Refinance request status and related old/new loan states reflect repayment success, failure, cancellation, or same-day duplicate rules.
action_families.notes: Needed for credit, business, and mortgage switching scenarios.

action_families.name: execute_remittance_case
postconditions: Remittance case, annual usage, fees, correction status, and transactions are updated or rejected.
action_families.notes: Outbound and inbound remittance use distinct age/fee/deadline rules.

action_families.name: update_card_state
postconditions: Card status/order/payment state changes only if age, consent, existing-card, balance, limit, and report-window rules permit it.
action_families.notes: Covers mini card issue/reissue/lost/payment-limit cases.

action_families.name: file_dispute_or_objection
postconditions: Dispute record exists and, when policy requires, affected target state carries a pending investigation or customer-fault flag.
action_families.notes: Useful for lost-card compensation, abnormal transaction restrictions, and affiliate-service disputes.

action_families.name: request_human_transfer
postconditions: A transfer request record is logged with a reason.
action_families.notes: Kept for cases where policy requires specialized handling or unavailable operation escalation.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_record_status
verifier_assertions.checks: Selected record status equals expected status.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_no_state_change
verifier_assertions.checks: Selected fields remain equal to initial fixture values.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_balance_delta
verifier_assertions.checks: Expected transaction exists and source/target balances changed accordingly.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_application_decision
verifier_assertions.checks: Application or comparison handoff decision matches expected status and reason.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_required_document_status
verifier_assertions.checks: Required document is in expected status and respects due date.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_consent_validity
verifier_assertions.checks: Consent exists and is active at task time if expected_valid is true.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_maturity_or_close_result
verifier_assertions.checks: Deposit maturity, auto-close, extension, or early close result is correct.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_loan_acceleration
verifier_assertions.checks: Loan acceleration/immediate repayment flag and reason match.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_refinance_outcome
verifier_assertions.checks: Refinance state and connected new-loan state match the policy outcome.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_remittance_outcome
verifier_assertions.checks: Remittance status and fee-refund behavior match expected outcome.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_card_order_outcome
verifier_assertions.checks: Card issue/reissue order status and reason match expected outcome.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_service_access
verifier_assertions.checks: Service feature access is allowed or blocked as expected.

verifier_assertions.name: assert_dispute_logged
verifier_assertions.checks: Dispute or objection was logged with the expected target and reason.

implementation_gates: Every task must list required_documents from the tau3-compatible document export.
Every write action must declare deterministic postconditions over state tables.
Every state-changing tool must be typed as write or explicitly mutates_state=true.
Read/search tools must never mutate state.
Every product in fact DB v0 must appear in product_state_mapping.
Loan household and enterprise layers remain separated; no task should attach the raw loan_common layer directly.
When a policy requires refusal, prefer an env assertion that the target state did not change plus communicate_info or NL assertion for the refusal explanation.
When user-side agency matters, use requestor=user actions instead of pretending the assistant executed the customer operation.
